author: decentralizedlaw
content:
I like taking existing blockchain apps and repurposing them with a new legal framework.

What I hope to contribute to the Ethereum ecosystem is more non-financial use-cases.

Recently I've created Vattelum, an open-source project building an interoperable decentralized legal system on Ethereum (a topic I have researched since 2017).

At its core: a new standard for storing and citing (private) laws across the Ethereum ecosystem.

It includes a small open-source standards package for citing on-chain legal documents (feedback welcome).

Repo:

https://github.com/vattelum/
